title: Azure IAM Privilege Escalation Chain — overview

dataset.query: FROM logs-azure.entra_id* | WHERE azure.entra_id.riskLevel == "high" | STATS c = COUNT()
FROM logs-azure.activity_log* | WHERE azure.activity_log.operation_name == "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write" | STATS c = COUNT()

FROM logs-azure.entra_id*, logs-azure.activity_log* | WHERE azure.entra_id.riskLevel IS NOT NULL OR azure.activity_log.operation_name IN ("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write", "Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/read") | STATS c = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip)
FROM logs-azure.entra_id* | WHERE azure.entra_id.riskLevel IS NOT NULL | STATS c = COUNT() BY r = azure.entra_id.riskLevel

FROM logs-azure.entra_id*, logs-azure.activity_log* | WHERE azure.entra_id.riskLevel IS NOT NULL OR azure.activity_log.operation_name IN ("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write", "Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/read") | STATS c = COUNT() BY b = BUCKET(`@timestamp`, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT b

config.title: Risky sign-ins and IAM activity by IP and user

dataset.query: FROM logs-azure.entra_id*, logs-azure.activity_log* | WHERE azure.entra_id.riskLevel IS NOT NULL OR azure.activity_log.operation_name IN ("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write", "Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/read") | STATS ops = COUNT(), upn = MAX(azure.entra_id.user_principal_name), op = MAX(azure.activity_log.operation_name) BY src = source.ip, user = user.name | SORT ops DESC | LIMIT 25
